c.d: The design and usability of the app's interface, affecting ease of use and user experience.
The range and quality of communication tools available, such as chat, video calls, and file sharing.
The ability to integrate with other tools and services, enhancing workflow efficiency.
The cost of the app, including free tiers and premium plans, and the value they offer.
The robustness of the app's security features to protect user data and privacy.
